title: Single-Nucleus Microglial Enrichment from Frozen Brain Tissue
author: Dominika Dostalova
materials: centrifuge
rotors
Fixation Solution
1.5 mL tube
nuclei suspension
FACS
384-well plates
modified Lysis Buffer
Keep all solutions On ice and keep samples on dry ice.

Prepare following solutions On ice : Fixation Solution (per sample): Reagent Volume [µL] C_stock C_final 1 DPBS -/- 2432.5 - - 2 Formaldehyde 67.5 36% 4% 3 Total 2500 2.5M Glycine (stock): %s %s 2M Sucrose Solution (stock): Reagent Volume C_stock C_final 1 Sucrose 6.846 g - 2M 2 Tris-HCl pH 7,4 100 µL 1M 10mM 3 NaCl 20 µL 5M 10mM 4 MgCl2 30 µL 1M 3mM 5 Nuclease Free Water fill up to 10 mL - - 6 Total 10 mL First dissolve the weighed Sucrose in ~65% of the final NFW volume, then add the other solutions and finally fill to the final volume with the remaining NFW. Once prepared, filter the Sucrose solution through a 0.22µm filter using a syringe with a Luer Lock . Lysis Buffer (per sample): Reagent Volume [µL] C_stock C_final 1 Nuclease Free Water 3260 - - 2 Tris-HCl pH 7,4 40 1M 10mM 3 NaCl 8 5M 10mM 4 MgCl2 12 1M 3mM 5 NP40 40 10% 0.1% 6 2M Sucrose 640 2M 0.32M 7 RNaseOUT 20 40 U/mL 0.2 U/mL 8 Total 4020 Sucrose Diluting Solution (per sample): Reagent Volume [µL] C_stock C_final 1 Nuclease Free Water 1083.5 - - 2 Tris-HCl pH 7,4 11 1M 10mM 3 NaCl 2.2 5M 10mM 4 MgCl2 3.3 1mM 3mM 5 Total 1100 1.2M Sucrose Solution (per sample): Reagent Volume [µL] C_stock C_final 1 2M Sucrose 720 2M 1.2M 2 Sucrose dil. sol. 480 - - 3 RNaseOUT 6 40 U/mL 0.2 U/mL 4 Total 1206 1M Sucrose Solution (per sample): Reagent Volume [µL] C_stock C_final 1 2M Sucrose 500 2M 1M 2 Sucrose dil. sol. 500 - - 3 RNaseOUT 5 40 U/mL 0.2 U/mL 4 Total 1005 Nuclei Wash Buffer (per sample): Reagent Volume [µL] C_stock C_final 1 DPBS -/- 3593 - - 2 BSA 257 7.5% 0.5% 3 RNaseOUT 19.25 40 U/mL 0.2 U/mL 4 Total 3869.25
Add antibodies in recommended ratios Ab - marker Ord No Fluorochrome Producer Dilution 1 ACSA-2 130-116-245 APC Milteneyi 1:160 2 NeuN Mab 377X AF-488 Merck 1:400 3 PU.1 81886S PE CST 1:400
Leave some volume of suspension without antibodies as Negative Control.
Incubate the suspension with antibodies Overnight at 4 °C , protected from light. After night:
Keep working surface clean and RNases-free.
Use the pipette tips with filters.
Put On ice and start timing.
Crush brain(s) with a disposable pellet pestle.

Preparation of Lysis Buffer Mix : a) with RNaseOUT as RNase inhibitor: Reagent Volume [µl] perwell Volume [µl] per384-well plate C_stock C_final 1 Low TE buffer 0.215 107.5 - - 2 dNTP 0.02 10 10mM 0.5mM 3 Oligo dTVN30 0.005 2.5 10µM 0.125µM 4 SIRV - dilution 1:2000 0.001 0.5 - - 5 PEG 8000 0.05 25 40% 5% 6 Thermolabile proteinase K 0.006 3 120U/mL 2.4U/mL 7 RNaseOUT 0.003 1.5 40U/µL 0.4U/µL 8 Total 0.3 150 b) with SEQURNA as RNase inhibitor: %s %s

Cell lysis protocol on thermocycler was changed for proteinase digestion and denaturation: First, incubate the plate for 00:30:00 at 37 °C , followed by 00:30:00 at 56 °C , then 00:15:00 at 80 °C . and finally 4 °C hold.

steps.title: Cool the centrifuge to 2 °C...
steps.instruction: Cool the centrifuge to 2 °C , along with the necessary rotors.

steps.title: Cool CellTrics filters in the fridge
steps.instruction: Cool CellTrics filters in the fridge.

steps.title: Add 300 µL of cooled Fixation...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of cooled Fixation Solution to brain tissue (1/4 of a mouse brain) in a 1.5mL tube kept on dry ice.

steps.title: Transfer the suspension using a 1mL...
steps.instruction: Transfer the suspension using a 1mL wide-bore tip into a 2mL tube containing 1.6 mL of cooled Fixation Solution.

steps.title: Shake the sample On ice at 300 rpm, °C,
steps.instruction: Shake the sample On ice at 300 rpm, °C, . Incubate no longer than 00:10:00 (counting from step 2).

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.1 mL of 2.5M Glycine (final concentration of glycine is 0.125M).

steps.title: Mix the suspension manually by inverting
steps.instruction: Mix the suspension manually by inverting .

steps.title: Keep the sample On ice and...
steps.instruction: Keep the sample On ice and shake at 300 rpm, °C, for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Spin the cell suspension at 1100...
steps.instruction: Spin the cell suspension at 1100 x g, °C, for 00:05:00 at 2 °C .

steps.title: Remove the supernatant by pipetting
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant by pipetting.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 1 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 1 mL of ice-cold Lysis Buffer using 1mL wide-bore tips (first wash).

steps.title: Spin the cell suspension at 1100...
steps.instruction: Spin the cell suspension at 1100 x g, °C, for 00:05:00 at 2 °C .

steps.title: Remove the supernatant by pipetting
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant by pipetting.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet with 1 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet with 1 mL of ice-cold Lysis Buffer using 1mL wide-bore tips (second wash).

steps.title: Spin the cell suspension at 1100...
steps.instruction: Spin the cell suspension at 1100 x g, °C, for 00:05:00 at 2 °C .

steps.title: Remove the supernatant by pipetting
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant by pipetting.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet with 1 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet with 1 mL of ice-cold Lysis Buffer using 1mL wide-bore tips.

steps.title: Transfer the mixture into a pre-cooled Dounce homogenizer
steps.instruction: Transfer the mixture into a pre-cooled Dounce homogenizer.

steps.title: While keeping homogenizer On ice ,...
steps.instruction: While keeping homogenizer On ice , homogenize with the Pestle A ( 5 times for mouse / 15 times for human).

steps.title: While keeping homogenizer On ice ,...
steps.instruction: While keeping homogenizer On ice , homogenize with the Pestle B - 10 times .

steps.title: Transfer the homogenized solution onto a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the homogenized solution onto a 30µm filter placed in 2mL LoBind tube .

steps.title: Rinse the homogenizer with 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Rinse the homogenizer with 500 µL of the Lysis Buffer and transfer it onto the same filter.

steps.title: Incubate the samples On ice for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples On ice for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Prepare a 2mL tube with 500 µL of 1
steps.instruction: Prepare a 2mL tube with 500 µL of 1.2M Sucrose Solution .

steps.title: Carefully transfer the entire volume of...
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the entire volume of cell suspension onto the 1.2M Sucrose Solution (avoid mixing) ( Fig. 1 ). Fig. 1 : Layering of the nuclei suspension on top of 1.2M Sucrose Solution.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 x g, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 x g, °C, , Brake and Acceleration (1 ,

steps.title: Meanwhile, prepare a 1
steps.instruction: Meanwhile, prepare a 1.5 mL tube with 500 µL of 1.2M Sucrose Solution.

steps.title: After centrifugation, aspirate the upper phase...
steps.instruction: After centrifugation, aspirate the upper phase and most of lower phase, leaving 100-200 µL .

steps.title: Resuspend the remaining volume in 1...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the remaining volume in 1 mL of 1M Sucrose Solution.

steps.title: Carefully transfer the entire mix onto the 1
steps.instruction: Carefully transfer the entire mix onto the 1.2M Sucrose Solution prepared in step 19 (avoid mixing).

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 x g, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 x g, °C, , Brake and Acceleration (1 ,

steps.title: Aspirate upper phase and most of...
steps.instruction: Aspirate upper phase and most of lower phase, leaving 100-200 µL .

steps.title: Resuspend the remaining volume in 1...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the remaining volume in 1 mL of Nuclei Wash Buffer.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1100 x g, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1100 x g, °C, , Brake and Acceleration (9 ,

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 500 µL of Nuclei Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 500 µL of Nuclei Wash Buffer.

steps.title: Incubate the samples On ice for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples On ice for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Transfer the desired amount of nuclei suspension into a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the desired amount of nuclei suspension into a 1.5 mL tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1100 x g, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1100 x g, °C, for 00:05:00 at 2 °C .

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend the nuclei in 1 mL of Nuclei Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend the nuclei in 1 mL of Nuclei Wash Buffer.

steps.title: Centrifuge all samples along with the...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge all samples along with the Negative Control at 1100 x g, °C, for 00:05:00 at 2 °C

steps.title: Remove the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei in 1 mL Nuclei Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei in 1 mL Nuclei Wash Buffer.

steps.title: Filter the suspension through a 30 µm filter
steps.instruction: Filter the suspension through a 30 µm filter.

steps.title: Gating strategy for sorting * Smart-seq3xpress...
steps.instruction: Gating strategy for sorting * Smart-seq3xpress protocol has several changes in comparison with the original protocol: Smart-seq3xpress by Michael Hagemann-Jensen

steps.title: The number of cycles during Preamplification...
steps.instruction: The number of cycles during Preamplification PCR is set to 15.
